ch: 我是拉阿魯哇族的小孩。

ab: matarungahlʉ salia hlamu maru cucu’u lalima.
en: There are five people in our family.

ab: salia hlamu maru ahlahlalua hlimihlimilavaʉ tatulu.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: miaʉlʉsʉ aku ama’a, ina’a, ahlalua hlahlusa nua ahlalua ahlaina.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: tam mirihli a inaku, maisasavusavuanʉ inaku.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: ma salia macahlia ama’ana pialʉsʉ a mu masi kari tahlana.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Hla′alua language with us at home.

ab: taluvaʉlʉ ahlamacicia rianʉ a mu puaili miararuma.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: matialʉsʉ matiasangalʉ ihlaku nua ahlahlalua tamuciakʉ.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: tam marumuku a ku cucu salia hlamu.
en: I like our family very much.
